actions.expression:
SELECT chyjh.sid,chyjh.khmc,chyjh.kh_id 
FROM chyjh 
WHERE (chyjh.fphm=[验货报告.出运单号]) 
  AND permission('') 
ORDER BY chyjh.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT kh.sid,kh.country 
FROM kh 
WHERE (kh.company_name=[验货报告.客户名称]) 
  AND permission('客户资料') 
ORDER BY kh.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT cghtsheet.sid,
       cghtsheet.cpbh,
       cghtsheet.zwpm,
       cght.hthm,
       cghtsheet.cpgg,
       cghtsheet.yse,
       cghtsheet.zhwbzh,
       cghtsheet.nhrl,
       cghtsheet.wxrl,
       cghtsheet.jldw,
       cghtsheet.cgxs,
       cghtsheet.cgsl,
       cghtsheet.cgjg,
       cghtsheet.zje,
       cght.jhrq,
       cghtsheet.tj,
       cghtsheet.jz,
       cghtsheet.mz,
       cghtsheet.zjz,
       cghtsheet.zmz,
       cghtsheet.ztj,
       cghtsheet.bzcd,
       cghtsheet.bzkd,
       cghtsheet.bzgd,
       cghtsheet.nhwx,
       cghtsheet.ks,
       cghtsheet.wyzd
FROM cght,cghtsheet 
WHERE (cght.sid=cghtsheet.pid) 
  AND (cght.wyzd=[验货报告.唯一字段]) 
ORDER BY cghtsheet.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT cggdsheet.sid,
       cggdsheet.cpbh,
       cggdsheet.zwmc,
       cggdsheet.hwms,
       cggdsheet.ysks,
       cggdsheet.bzyq,
       cggdsheet.nxrl,
       cggdsheet.zxl,
       cggdsheet.dw,
       cggdsheet.htzxs,
       cggdsheet.htzsl,
       cggdsheet.jhrq,
       cggdsheet.qrjq,
       cggdsheet.yjch,
       cggdsheet.wxcc,
       cggdsheet.jz,
       cggdsheet.mz,
       cggdsheet.htzjz,
       cggdsheet.htzmz,
       cggdsheet.sjzl,
       cggdsheet.htztj,
       cggdsheet.cgbh,
       cggdsheet.bzcd,
       cggdsheet.bzkd,
       cggdsheet.bzgd,
       cggdsheet.nhwx,
       cggdsheet.ks,
       cggdsheet.yskd
FROM cggd,cggdsheet 
WHERE (cggd.sid=cggdsheet.pid) 
  AND (cggd.wyzd=[验货报告.唯一字段]) 
ORDER BY cggdsheet.sid ASC

actions.name: 对应采购
actions.caption: 对应采购
actions.expression:
SELECT cght.sid 
FROM cght 
WHERE (cght.hthm=[验货报告.唯一字段]) 
ORDER BY cght.sid ASC

actions.name: 计算-净重合计
actions.caption: 计算-净重合计
actions.expression: [验货报告.产品资料.箱数合计]*[验货报告.产品资料.实际净重]
actions.output: 验货报告.产品资料.净重合计

actions.name: 计算-毛重合计
actions.caption: 计算-毛重合计
actions.expression: [验货报告.产品资料.箱数合计]*[验货报告.产品资料.实际毛重]
actions.output: 验货报告.产品资料.毛重合计

actions.name: 计算-体积合计
actions.caption: 计算-体积合计
actions.expression: [验货报告.产品资料.箱数合计]*[验货报告.产品资料.外箱体积]
actions.output: 验货报告.产品资料.体积合计

view.params:
SELECT chyjh.fphm,chyjh.SID
FROM chyjh
WHERE   ((:qxjb1=2) OR ((:qxjb1 =0) AND (chyjh.sys_owner=:c_user)) OR ((:qxjb1 =1) AND (chyjh.sys_path like :c_depart)))
ORDER BY chyjh.SID ASC
